name: The Time Traveler
description: A sci-fi short film about a scientist who discovers time travel but faces moral dilemmas about changing the past.
project_notes: Aiming for festival submissions in Fall 2026. Focus on practical effects with minimal CGI.
overview_summary: A brilliant physicist discovers time travel but must decide whether to prevent a tragedy from her past, knowing that changing history could have catastrophic consequences.
overview_tagline: Some moments should never be changed.
overview_logline: When Dr. Sarah Mills invents a time machine, she faces an impossible choice: save her sister from a fatal accident or preserve the timeline that led to her groundbreaking discovery.

characters.name: Dr. Sarah Mills
characters.description: 38-year-old physicist, brilliant but haunted by her sister's death
characters.backstory: Lost her sister Emma in a car accident 10 years ago. Her grief drove her to pursue time travel research.
characters.notes: Wears her sister's necklace as a reminder

characters.name: Dr. Marcus Reed
characters.description: Sarah's mentor and colleague, voice of reason
characters.arc: From observer to active participant in Sarah's decision
characters.backstory: Has known Sarah since graduate school. Understands the weight of her loss.

characters.name: Emma Mills
characters.description: Sarah's younger sister, appears in flashbacks and altered timeline
characters.arc: Exists only in memory and altered reality
characters.backstory: Was killed in a car accident at age 25. Free spirit who lived life fully.

sequences.name: Act 1: Discovery
sequences.description: Sarah successfully tests time travel for the first time and realizes the implications

scenes.name: Scene 1
scenes.heading: INT. PHYSICS LAB - NIGHT
scenes.synopsis: Sarah works late in her lab, making final adjustments to her time displacement device. After months of failures, the machine suddenly activates, creating a brief temporal distortion.
scenes.camera_notes: Handheld, intimate close-ups emphasizing Sarah's exhaustion and determination
scenes.lighting_notes: Harsh fluorescent lab lights, with warm glow from the machine

sound_notes.note: Low electrical hum building to crescendo

actions.description: Sarah adjusts calibration dials on the machine
The machine activates, creating a visible ripple in space-time
Sarah watches in amazement as a coffee mug appears to age rapidly then reverse

dialogues.text: Come on... just one more adjustment...
dialogues.delivery_note: Muttering to herself, exhausted but focused

dialogues.text: Oh my god. It's working. Emma, I can fix this. I can save you.

shots.name: Shot 1A
shots.description: Tight on Sarah's face, showing determination and exhaustion
shots.notes: Natural light from equipment, shadows under eyes

shots.name: Shot 1B
shots.description: Lab overview showing Sarah alone with the machine
shots.notes: Emphasize isolation and scale of her work

scenes.name: Scene 2
scenes.heading: INT. SARAH'S APARTMENT - EARLY MORNING
scenes.synopsis: Sarah returns home exhausted but exhilarated. She looks at old photos of Emma, wrestling with the possibility of changing the past.
scenes.camera_notes: Smooth, deliberate movements. More composed than Scene 1.
scenes.lighting_notes: Dawn light through windows, soft and warm

actions.description: Sarah enters apartment, sets down keys
Picks up photo of Emma from shelf

sequences.name: Act 2: Temptation
sequences.description: Sarah debates whether to use the machine to save Emma, consulting with Marcus

scenes.name: Scene 3
scenes.heading: INT. MARCUS'S OFFICE - DAY
scenes.synopsis: Sarah tells Marcus about the successful test. He warns her about the dangers of changing the past, but she's already made up her mind.
scenes.camera_notes: Shot-reverse-shot for dialogue, emphasizing their opposing viewpoints
scenes.lighting_notes: Natural window light, creating contrast between characters

dialogues.text: Sarah, you can't be serious. Do you understand the implications?
I've spent ten years on this. Ten years, Marcus. I can finally make it right.

beats.name: The Decision
beats.description: Sarah decides to save Emma despite warnings

locations.name: Physics Lab
locations.description: High-tech research lab with experimental equipment. Sterile but cluttered with Sarah's work.
locations.notes: Need permission from Physics Dept. and safety officer approval

locations.name: Sarah's Apartment
locations.address: Modern city apartment - Studio set or practical
locations.description: Small but tidy 1-bedroom. Personal photos visible. Scientific journals on coffee table.
locations.access_notes: Can use team member's apartment or build minimal set
locations.notes: Key props: Emma's photo, necklace, research notes

schedule_items.title: Table Read
schedule_items.description: Full cast table read with director and producers
schedule_items.notes: Catering provided. Script revisions to follow.

schedule_items.title: Principal Photography Day 1
schedule_items.notes: Call sheet to be distributed 48hrs prior

cast_members.notes: Priority casting. Looking for 35-42 age range with dramatic range.

crew_members.name: TBD
crew_members.notes: Need someone experienced with sci-fi aesthetics and practical effects

crew_members.name: TBD
crew_members.notes: Build time machine prop and lab set dressing
